questions.question: Explain the difference between a singly linked list and a doubly linked list. Provide an example to illustrate this difference. (3 marks)
Write a C function to insert a new node at the beginning of a singly linked list. (5 marks)
A singly linked list is implemented using a circularly linked chain. Write a C function to check if a given node is the head of the circular chain. (5 marks)
